intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No credential files should be accessed.
notes: curl holds a browser cookie database path open while making outbound HTTPS. Tests credential detection for browser profile paths.

live.inject_cmd: bash -c 'COOKIE_DIR=~/.config/chromium/Default; mkdir -p "$COOKIE_DIR"; COOKIE="$COOKIE_DIR/Cookies"; [ -f "$COOKIE" ] || { echo "# dummy" > "$COOKIE"; CREATED=1; }; exec 3< "$COOKIE"; curl -sS -m 8 --resolve one.one.one.one:443:{TARGET_IP} https://one.one.one.one/ >/dev/null; rc=$?; sleep 10; exec 3<&-; if [ "${CREATED:-}" = 1 ]; then rm -f "$COOKIE"; fi; exit $rc'
